description: Reusable frontend/backend blocks for rapid app scaffolding

blocks.name: Next.js App Shell
blocks.description: package.json, next.config.js, Tailwind CSS, app/layout.js, globals.css

blocks.name: Supabase Client Setup
blocks.description: Browser + server Supabase clients, middleware for session refresh

blocks.name: Email + Password Auth
blocks.description: Login page, signup page, forgot/reset password, logout API route

blocks.name: Google / GitHub OAuth
blocks.description: One-click Google or GitHub login via Supabase OAuth, callback handler

blocks.name: Dashboard Layout
blocks.description: Smart sidebar nav (auto-generated from entities), header shell, auth guard

blocks.name: CRUD Data Tables
blocks.description: DataTable component + one full page per entity (sort, filter, pagination)

blocks.name: CRUD API Routes
blocks.description: One GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE API route per entity, wired to Supabase

blocks.name: Charts & Stats
blocks.description: StatsCard, LineChart, BarChart — smart dashboard overview using entity data

blocks.name: Notifications
blocks.description: Toast alerts (success/error/info/warning) + notification bell with dropdown

blocks.name: Kanban Board
blocks.description: Drag-and-drop kanban board — smart columns match entity status values

blocks.name: Settings Page
blocks.description: Profile, account (password change), notifications preferences — tabbed layout

blocks.name: AI Chat
blocks.description: Streaming Claude chat UI + API route — smart system prompt from app description

blocks.name: Landing Page
blocks.description: Hero + nav + CTA — headline, tagline, subheadline all AI-generated from description

blocks.name: Stripe Payments
blocks.description: Payment intent API + webhook handler + lib/stripe.js wrapper

blocks.name: Email (Resend)
blocks.description: lib/resend.js wrapper + transactional email API route

blocks.name: File Upload
blocks.description: Multipart upload → Supabase Storage → returns public URL

blocks.name: Cron Jobs
blocks.description: Scheduled job API endpoint + Railway cron runner script

blocks.name: Environment Template
blocks.description: .env.local template with all standard service vars pre-filled

blocks.name: Task Management
blocks.description: Drag-drop Kanban board for tasks, CRUD API, assignees, priorities, due dates

blocks.name: Email Campaigns
blocks.description: Batch email sender via Resend (up to 100/batch), campaign builder UI

blocks.name: Stripe Connect (Marketplace)
blocks.description: Host onboarding via Stripe Express, charge-with-transfer, platform fee, payouts

blocks.name: SMS (Telnyx)
blocks.description: Send/receive SMS via Telnyx, OTP generation + verification, inbound webhook

blocks.name: About Page
blocks.description: Team/mission/values page — headline + tagline from config

blocks.name: Pricing Page
blocks.description: 3-tier pricing with highlight, feature lists, and CTA buttons

blocks.name: Contact Form
blocks.description: Contact page with form → saves to DB + sends notification email

blocks.name: Booking / Reservation System
blocks.description: BookingForm with date range picker, guest count, price breakdown, conflict check

blocks.name: Search + Filter UI
blocks.description: SearchFilters bar + ListingCard grid — location, dates, guests, price, rating filters

blocks.name: Reviews & Ratings
blocks.description: Star rating picker, review form, breakdown bars, auto-updates listing average

blocks.name: Image Gallery
blocks.description: Hero + 4-grid layout with lightbox — Airbnb-style photo viewer

blocks.name: Map View (Leaflet)
blocks.description: Property price-pin markers on OpenStreetMap — no API key required

blocks.name: User Profiles
blocks.description: ProfileCard with stats, badges, bio, languages — host/guest role support

blocks.name: Real-time Chat
blocks.description: Supabase realtime message subscription, conversation threads, inbox list

blocks.name: Roles & Permissions (RBAC)
blocks.description: Role hierarchy (admin/moderator/member/guest), requireRole() API guard, PermissionGate component, RoleManager admin UI

blocks.name: Stripe Subscriptions (SaaS Billing)
blocks.description: Customer creation, Checkout sessions for recurring billing, Billing Portal, webhook sync to subscriptions table

blocks.name: Waitlist / Pre-launch Signup
blocks.description: Waitlist landing page with position tracking, email confirmation via Resend, admin list view

blocks.name: SEO Metadata & Structured Data
blocks.description: buildMetadata() helper, JSON-LD generators (article/product/faq/breadcrumb), Breadcrumbs component

blocks.name: Blog (CMS)
blocks.description: Blog index page with tag filter + pagination, post detail with prose rendering, CRUD API, slugs, view counting

blocks.name: Audit Log
blocks.description: Fire-and-forget audit() helper, paginated AuditLogViewer table, GET API with filters by user/action/resource

blocks.name: Dark Mode Toggle
blocks.description: ThemeProvider (system/light/dark, persisted in localStorage), ThemeToggle button with sun/moon icons

blocks.name: Form Builder
blocks.description: Drag-sort form editor UI (10 field types, options, required), FormRenderer for end-users, submissions stored in DB

blocks.name: Comment Threads
blocks.description: Threaded comments on any resource — attach to posts, listings, tasks. Realtime-friendly, nested replies, delete own.

blocks.name: Persistent Notifications
blocks.description: DB-backed notification feed with Supabase realtime push, unread badge, mark-read, type icons

blocks.name: CSV Export
blocks.description: ExportButton component + /api/export endpoint — download any DB table as CSV with optional column/filter params

blocks.name: Onboarding Wizard
blocks.description: Multi-step onboarding wizard with radio/text fields, progress bar, saves answers to profiles table

blocks.name: Feature Flags
blocks.description: Per-plan and per-user feature toggles with admin UI — gate features by plan, enable for specific users

blocks.name: API Key Management
blocks.description: Generate/revoke SHA-256 hashed API keys per user — scopes, expiry, usage tracking, ApiKeyManager UI

blocks.name: WhatsApp Messaging
blocks.description: Send/receive WhatsApp messages via Meta Cloud API — text, templates, buttons, images. Inbound webhook stores messages.

blocks.name: Slack Notifications
blocks.description: Send alerts to Slack channels or DMs — webhook, Bot API, interactive buttons, slash command handler

blocks.name: AI Auto-Reply
blocks.description: Claude-powered auto-reply across all channels (chat, SMS, WhatsApp, Slack). Escalates to human on trigger words. Stores conversation history.

blocks.name: User Data Grid (Spreadsheet)
blocks.description: Airtable-like data grid — search, sort, filter, inline edit, add/delete rows, CSV export. Works on any DB table.

blocks.name: Reminder Service
blocks.description: User-set reminders delivered via email/SMS/WhatsApp — one-time or repeating (daily/weekly/monthly). Cron fires due reminders.

blocks.name: Capacitor Mobile (iOS + Android)
blocks.description: Wraps the Next.js web app into a real iOS/Android app — static export, native shell, push notifications, app icon, APK build scripts.
